channel.title: Knowledge Base on See Hiong's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Knowledge Base on See Hiong's Blog

item.title: Building a Self-Hosted HDB Knowledge Chatbot with Dify
item.description: A practical walkthrough of building a self-hosted, knowledge-driven chatbot using Dify. This guide covers deploying Dify with Docker Compose, creating a Knowledge Base from HDB township planning documents, designing a conversational Chatflow, and exploring Kubernetes deployment options using community-supported Helm charts and manifests.
